variables.notes: Changed MANUALLY. The selected XSGA bucket excludes depreciation/amortization and consists of Selling/General/Admin. Expense, Employee benefit expenses, and Other operating expenses. A separate operating D&A summary exists at the same level, implying D&A is outside those selected rows and should be added separately. Because the summary row also includes impairment losses, it is not suitable for direct selection under the task rules; therefore the pure D&A component rows are chosen instead. Manual review is warranted because the statement does not explicitly allocate these D&A components between SG&A and other operating functions, but they clearly sit outside the selected XSGA rows.
